sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: MADOR 1099 Process Abort
parameters.body:
The MADOR 1099 process can not run while another instance of the job in the P_RUN_CYCLE is open as running.

EdwMassKc1099ExtrCntl used the following values when doing the ProcessCheckExtr:

Subject: MADOR_1099
Source: EDW
Target: EDW

parameters.subject: MADOR - Internal Review
parameters.body:
Hello, 

Attached the summary file with Creditable and Non creditable member counts. 
Also Actuary's Undetermined Creditability Report is available at O:\library\Actuarial_Services\Non-PHI\Shared\MADOR


Team, 

If we are good to generate the output file to NextPage team,  Please create a change request to _IS_SCHED to execute and enable the Zena job MADOR_OUTBOUND_EXTRACT_WEEKLY_000 by setting the "SkipFTP" parameter value to 'false'  in order to send the file to Nextpage. 
This is a weekly job. Once this job is completed, please make sure the ETL developer uploads the XML (/edw/prod/external/Mador1099_<current_timestamp>.xml) to the following web page every week until the above Zena job is disabled. 

https://secft.dor.state.ma.us/bulkfile
Username: BLUEKC
Password: KC!Blue321
